'''鈭歱-k-j-dh''' ('''kapakjedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jark|jark]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-k-j-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jark|jark]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-k-j-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kapakjedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipakjedhoko|thipakjedhoko]] || [[word:jipakjedhoko|jipakjedhoko]] || [[word:shipakjedhoko|shipakjedhoko]] || [[word:kipakjedhoko|kipakjedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupakjedhoko|thuthupakjedhoko]] || [[word:jujupakjedhoko|jujupakjedhoko]] || [[word:shushupakjedhoko|shushupakjedhoko]] || [[word:kukupakjedhoko|kukupakjedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopakjedhoko|thopakjedhoko]] || [[word:jopakjedhoko|jopakjedhoko]] || [[word:shopakjedhoko|shopakjedhoko]] || [[word:kopakjedhoko|kopakjedhoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙pakjedhoko|th忙pakjedhoko]] || [[word:j忙pakjedhoko|j忙pakjedhoko]] || [[word:sh忙pakjedhoko|sh忙pakjedhoko]] || [[word:k忙pakjedhoko|k忙pakjedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapakjedhoko|thathapakjedhoko]] || [[word:jajapakjedhoko|jajapakjedhoko]] || [[word:shashapakjedhoko|shashapakjedhoko]] || [[word:kakapakjedhoko|kakapakjedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapakjedhoko|thapakjedhoko]] || [[word:japakjedhoko|japakjedhoko]] || [[word:shapakjedhoko|shapakjedhoko]] || [[word:kapakjedhoko|kapakjedhoko]]

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
